response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified the song "Intergalactic Bound" using the on-screen text in the corner (00:00-00:35). 2. Used the search query `"Intergalactic Bound" Yunosuke Circus-P Japanese and English lyrics` to find the song information and lyrics. 3. Identified that the rest of the video (from 00:35 onward) is a spoken announcement/interaction, not a musical performance. 4. Compiled the final JSON data.
response.global_summary: A video segment featuring VTuber Cecilia Immergreen performing a cover of the song "Intergalactic Bound" by Yunosuke and Circus-P, followed by a speaking segment where she announces her first original song, "Wind Up".

scenes.description: VTuber Cecilia Immergreen performs a 3D dance and vocal cover of "Intergalactic Bound". The song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
私たちは緑の波を作ります。
あなたの叫びを聞かせて！
どんな観光地が見えますか？
Whoa Oh, Whoa Oh Oh
Whoa Oh, Whoa Oh Oh

小さな声が千と歌う
これからはお祭りです
私たちの遊び道具がいつもそばにあります
私たちがこの歌を作るのを手伝うために
夜の暗闇を通って
私たちは大丈夫だと知っています
空の向こうには宇宙のポジティブさがあります
星は何千もあります
彼らは光を保ちます
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
We’ll make a wave of green
And let me hear you shout!
What sights can we see?
Whoa Oh, Whoa Oh Oh
Whoa Oh, Whoa Oh Oh

A thousand little voices sing
It's a fiesta from now on
With our playthings always by our side
To help us make this song
Through the dark of the night
I know we will be alright
There's a universe of positivity beyond the sky
There's thousand of the stars
They will keep an light

scenes.description: Cecilia Immergreen talks to the audience, announces her first original song, "Wind Up", and interacts with the chat. The rest of the video is non-musical.
